cited_text: They let seven people die in the street every day with our billions of tax dollars, and they say, we need new beds. It's a drug problem. 90% of these people are drug addicts. We need to get these people mandatory treatment. Then we could get them beds.

cited_text: So when I'm mayor, my plan is, first three weeks, signs up across the city, no more nakedness, no more drug use, no more robbing, no worse.

begins — so people self-select out before handcuffs
appear. Tactically sensible; legally cleaner than
an overnight sweep.
